steps.title: Locate the contrast
steps.content: The text says Erdrich's writing usually portrays everyday life in Ojibwe communities, while some novels have fantastical plots and occur outside those communities. It then gives The Antelope Woman as an example set in an urban Indigenous community in Minneapolis.

steps.title: Use the stated difference
steps.content: Choice A is not presented as a difference from most of her work. Choice C and Choice D are not mentioned at all. The stated difference is that the novel is set outside the usual rural Ojibwe-community setting. The answer is B.
